backend/main.mo: Defines a minimal Motoko actor with no public methods, serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (Highway Rush game, controls, traffic, day/night cycle, collision effects, etc.) to their source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their roles in the multi-game platform including CSS themes, hooks, game pages, and routing.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Ultimate Gaming Arena' that mounts the app at the root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router using TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page components for all 24+ game routes, wrapped in a React Query provider and a shared root layout.
frontend/src/components/AchievementNotif: A fixed-position toast notification component that displays unlocked achievement alerts with icon, name, description, and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/DifficultySelect: A full-screen modal component that presents Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulty buttons with neon-styled visuals and calls a callback with the selected difficulty.
Modal shown on first visit prompting the user to choose a username and avatar, then saves the resulting profile to local storage.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders the 3x3 tic-tac-toe grid with status banner and restart button, highlighting winning cells and disabling occupied or game-over cells.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpOverlay.t: Full-screen animated overlay that displays a level-up celebration with the new level number, auto-dismissing after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/RootLayout.tsx: Top-level layout component providing the sticky navigation bar, achievement notifications, first-visit modal, and level-up overlay for all pages.
frontend/src/components/Scoreboard.tsx: Displays X and O player scores side-by-side with active-player highlighting and neon styling.
frontend/src/components/SoundToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles game sound mute/unmute state using the useSoundManager hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useAchievementNotific: Hook that manages a queue of achievement toast notifications, auto-removing each after 4 seconds and exposing manual dismiss.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkTrapEscapeSoun: Provides procedural Web Audio API sound effects and background music for the Dark Trap Escape game, with mute toggle persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLogic.ts: Implements Tic-Tac-Toe game logic as a React hook, managing board state, turn switching, win/draw detection, and move validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighwayRushSound.t: Provides Web Audio API sound management for the Highway Rush game, including a dynamic engine sound, background music melody, and mute state persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout, identity state, and login status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for backend queries; exports nothing as all game state is managed client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreboard.ts: Manages Tic-Tac-Toe player scores with localStorage persistence, providing increment and reset functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundManager.ts: Provides a general-purpose Web Audio API sound manager with multiple effect types (click, win, gameOver, score, special) and a mute toggle persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, defining CSS custom properties for a dark neon theme, and providing Tailwind utility classes for neon glow effects and UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Achievements.tsx: Displays a categorized achievements page showing locked/unlocked achievements with icons, unlock dates, and a reset option. Groups achievements by category (global, traffic, snake, rps, snakeladder) and renders each as a styled card.
frontend/src/pages/BrickBreakerGame.tsx: Canvas-based Brick Breaker game with paddle/ball/brick collision logic, keyboard and mouse controls, lives system, and sound effects. Awards XP and tracks player profile stats on win/loss.
frontend/src/pages/Connect4Game.tsx: Two-player Connect 4 game with a 6x7 board, win/draw detection in all directions, hover preview, score tracking, and sound effects. Awards XP and updates player profile on game end.
frontend/src/pages/DarkTrapEscapeGame.ts: A multi-level 2D platformer game rendered on a canvas with physics, hazards, moving platforms, particles, camera shake, and level progression. Manages game screens (menu, playing, paused, level select, victory) and persists level unlock state.
frontend/src/pages/EndlessRunnerGame.tsx: A Three.js-based 3D endless runner game with lane-switching, jumping, obstacle spawning, increasing speed, and a neon visual style. Tracks score via a React UI overlay and manages game state (idle, playing, gameover).
frontend/src/pages/FlappyBirdGame.tsx: Implements a Flappy Bird clone using an HTML5 canvas with game loop, physics, pipe generation, collision detection, and sound/XP integration.
frontend/src/pages/Game2048.tsx: Implements the 2048 tile-merging puzzle game with board logic, keyboard input, tile color theming, and sound support.
frontend/src/pages/HighwayRushGame.tsx: A 3D endless highway racing game built with Three.js featuring lane-based traffic dodging, coin collection, car skins, day/night cycle, and achievement tracking.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main home page that displays a grid of arcade and classic game cards with navigation links, sound toggle, and categorized game listings.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays a personal best scores leaderboard by reading high scores from localStorage for all supported games, with an option to reset all scores.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryCardMatch.tsx: A memory card matching game with emoji pairs where players flip cards to find matches, tracking moves, best score in localStorage, and awarding XP/wins on completion.
frontend/src/pages/MinesweeperGame.tsx: A 9x9 Minesweeper game with 10 mines, featuring flood-reveal, flagging, a timer, best-time tracking in localStorage, and XP rewards on winning.
frontend/src/pages/PacManGame.tsx: A canvas-based Pac-Man game with a predefined maze, pellets, power pellets, four ghosts with vulnerability states, lives, levels, and XP rewards on completion.
frontend/src/pages/PongGame.tsx: A canvas-based Pong game where a human player (keyboard) faces an AI opponent, tracking scores up to a win threshold with sound effects and game phase management.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: A player profile page displaying avatar, rank (Bronze–Platinum) with color theming, XP progress bar, level, and stat cards for games played, wins, and win rate.
frontend/src/pages/RockPaperScissors.tsx: React page implementing a Rock Paper Scissors game against a computer opponent, tracking scores, playing sounds, and recording achievements/XP on each round result.
frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx: React page for a single-player Tic-Tac-Toe game against an AI with easy/medium/hard difficulty levels, handling AI moves via minimax and tracking scores, achievements, and XP.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeAndLadder.tsx: React page implementing a two-player Snake and Ladder board game with a 100-cell board, dice rolling, animated player tokens, and snake/ladder event handling.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeArcadeGame.tsx: Canvas-based Snake arcade game with neon visuals, keyboard/direction controls, high score persistence via localStorage, and XP/sound integration on food collection and game over.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Canvas-based Snake game with selectable difficulty speeds, score milestones, achievement tracking, XP awards, and neon-styled rendering using a grid-based game loop.
frontend/src/pages/SpaceInvadersGame.tsx: A canvas-based Space Invaders game with alien waves, player shooting, lives, scoring, levels, and high score persistence via localStorage. Includes sound effects, XP awarding, and keyboard controls.
frontend/src/pages/TetrisGame.tsx: A canvas-based Tetris game implementing standard tetromino mechanics including rotation, line clearing, leveling, and high score persistence. Renders the board and a next-piece preview canvas with sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx: A canvas-based lane-switching traffic avoidance game where the player taps lanes to dodge enemy cars, with score milestones, XP rewards, and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/TwoPlayer.tsx: A two-player local Tic Tac Toe page that tracks scores, handles win/draw detection, awards XP, and records achievements using shared game logic and scoreboard hooks.
frontend/src/utils/achievements.ts: Defines and manages a list of game achievements stored in localStorage, providing functions to get, unlock, and notify on achievement completion, plus XP tracking utilities.
Defines TypeScript types and level data (platforms, hazards, spawn/exit points) for the Dark Trap Escape game, with multiple levels introducing static, fake, moving, and hidden-trap platforms alongside spike and crusher hazards.
frontend/src/utils/darkTrapEscapeProgres: Manages Dark Trap Escape level unlock progress using localStorage, providing functions to get, unlock, check, and reset unlocked levels.
frontend/src/utils/minimax.ts: Implements the Minimax algorithm for a Tic-Tac-Toe AI, exposing getBestMove for optimal play and getRandomMove for random move selection.
frontend/src/utils/playerProfile.ts: Handles player profile persistence in localStorage, including XP/level calculation, rank tiers, avatar paths, and helper functions to update stats like wins, score, and achievements.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani), neon colors/shadows, oklch-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for Highway Rush, an endless 3D traffic driving game built with React Three Fiber, listing implemented features such as car controls, traffic spawning, day/night cycle, collision effects, and HUD.
